## Meeting Purpose

[Leadership weekly to discuss account health, hiring needs, and prepare for all-hands meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/iEVh9ArbyNNkPeyspxADxLyYQv_1WsQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Urgent need to hire more managing editors and account managers to support rapid growth](https://fathom.video/share/iEVh9ArbyNNkPeyspxADxLyYQv_1WsQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=819.0)
  - [Daniel made significant progress moving workflows out of AirOps to improve speed and cost efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/iEVh9ArbyNNkPeyspxADxLyYQv_1WsQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=985.0)
  - [Account health issues arising due to balancing speed vs quality; need better processes for monitoring](https://fathom.video/share/iEVh9ArbyNNkPeyspxADxLyYQv_1WsQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1324.0)
  - [All-hands meeting tomorrow to cover recent progress, upcoming changes, and set expectations](https://fathom.video/share/iEVh9ArbyNNkPeyspxADxLyYQv_1WsQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=457.0)

## Topics

### Security Concerns

  - [Kyle reported phishing attempts targeting the company, including emails and text messages](https://fathom.video/share/iEVh9ArbyNNkPeyspxADxLyYQv_1WsQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=38.0)
  - [Marcel plans to bring on a security contractor to help implement measures like SOC 2 compliance](https://fathom.video/share/iEVh9ArbyNNkPeyspxADxLyYQv_1WsQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=71.0)
  - [Team will send a Slack message warning employees about phishing attempts](https://fathom.video/share/iEVh9ArbyNNkPeyspxADxLyYQv_1WsQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)

### Workflow Improvements

  - [Daniel moved key workflows (strategy, company research, assignment creation, clustering) out of AirOps to backend API](https://fathom.video/share/iEVh9ArbyNNkPeyspxADxLyYQv_1WsQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1023.0)
  - [New workflows include audience/competitor research with Google queries](https://fathom.video/share/iEVh9ArbyNNkPeyspxADxLyYQv_1WsQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1068.0)
  - [Changes reduce processing time from 10+ minutes to \~30 seconds](https://fathom.video/share/iEVh9ArbyNNkPeyspxADxLyYQv_1WsQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1162.0)
  - [Experience for end users remains largely the same, with some input changes](https://fathom.video/share/iEVh9ArbyNNkPeyspxADxLyYQv_1WsQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1049.0)

### Hiring Needs

  - [Urgent need to hire 2-4 engineers this month for runtime, Airtable replacement, and programmatic tasks](https://fathom.video/share/iEVh9ArbyNNkPeyspxADxLyYQv_1WsQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1186.0)
  - [Strong pipeline of managing editor candidates, but need more account managers](https://fathom.video/share/iEVh9ArbyNNkPeyspxADxLyYQv_1WsQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1304.0)
  - [Considering creating job levels (L1-L5) to better structure roles and compensation](https://fathom.video/share/iEVh9ArbyNNkPeyspxADxLyYQv_1WsQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1536.0)
  - [Exploring hiring a head of talent/recruiting to take over process from Marcel](https://fathom.video/share/iEVh9ArbyNNkPeyspxADxLyYQv_1WsQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1908.0)
  - [Potential high-potential hire (Claire) for client operations/community role](https://fathom.video/share/iEVh9ArbyNNkPeyspxADxLyYQv_1WsQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2178.0)

### Account Health

  - [Teams struggling to balance speed and quality across accounts](https://fathom.video/share/iEVh9ArbyNNkPeyspxADxLyYQv_1WsQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1324.0)
  - [Implementing more consistent account health review processes](https://fathom.video/share/iEVh9ArbyNNkPeyspxADxLyYQv_1WsQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [Need to set clearer expectations and templates for different account phases](https://fathom.video/share/iEVh9ArbyNNkPeyspxADxLyYQv_1WsQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1357.0)
  - [Pod structure rolling out in earnest this week, with managing editors taking larger role](https://fathom.video/share/iEVh9ArbyNNkPeyspxADxLyYQv_1WsQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1469.0)

### Outbound Process Setup

  - [Jimmy working on scaling outbound infrastructure for multiple new clients](https://fathom.video/share/iEVh9ArbyNNkPeyspxADxLyYQv_1WsQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2914.0)
  - [Requested earlier notification of new deal signings to prepare email domains](https://fathom.video/share/iEVh9ArbyNNkPeyspxADxLyYQv_1WsQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2929.0)
  - [Need to develop process for tracking contacted companies and recycling lists](https://fathom.video/share/iEVh9ArbyNNkPeyspxADxLyYQv_1WsQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=3098.0)

### All-Hands Meeting Prep

  - [Reviewed and consolidated agenda items](https://fathom.video/share/iEVh9ArbyNNkPeyspxADxLyYQv_1WsQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1287.0)
  - [Daniel to give 5-10 minute demo of new workflow improvements](https://fathom.video/share/iEVh9ArbyNNkPeyspxADxLyYQv_1WsQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [Marcel to cover recent progress, upcoming changes, and set expectations](https://fathom.video/share/iEVh9ArbyNNkPeyspxADxLyYQv_1WsQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=543.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Daniel to complete workflow improvements and prepare demo for all-hands](https://fathom.video/share/iEVh9ArbyNNkPeyspxADxLyYQv_1WsQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1129.0)
  - [Kyle to review and process new managing editor applications](https://fathom.video/share/iEVh9ArbyNNkPeyspxADxLyYQv_1WsQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1304.0)
  - [Marcel to pursue hiring Bridget as chief of staff and explore other key hires](https://fathom.video/share/iEVh9ArbyNNkPeyspxADxLyYQv_1WsQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1387.0)
  - [Jimmy to continue scaling outbound infrastructure and develop tracking processes](https://fathom.video/share/iEVh9ArbyNNkPeyspxADxLyYQv_1WsQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2914.0)
  - [Team to finalize all-hands agenda and time allocations](https://fathom.video/share/iEVh9ArbyNNkPeyspxADxLyYQv_1WsQJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1286.0)
